sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35393" key="e)neceme/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνεξεμέω</orth>, <sense id="n35393.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">vomit in,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">λεκανίῳ</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0499.tlg001:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polyzel.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
